content: hunter: Gods, this rain is pissing me off. Can’t even track shit with the mud washing everything away. Saw a bear earlier though—big fucker, tore up a bandit camp like they were wet parchment. Hunter 2: Oh yeah? Bet the bandits screamed like little girls before they got mauled. Bears don’t give a shit about stealth—just raw power. Like some of the Dibella-worshipping freaks in Markarth. You hear what they did to that new priestess last week? hunter: Hah! Fuck, don’t remind me. Walked in on them once—whole temple was a writhing mess of skin and sweat. Priestess was taking three at once like it was morning prayers. Skyrim’s gone mad. Hunter 2: Mad? Nah, it’s just honest now. Rather fuck openly than pretend we’re all saints like the damn Stormcloaks. Speaking of, you see that group of ‘em get ambushed by Forsworn near Karthwasten? Bastards didn’t just kill ‘em—made ‘em scream first. hunter: Serves the racist pricks right. Though I ain’t saying the Forsworn are better—just batshit in a different way. Saw one of their hagravens riding a fucking troll yesterday. Bet that wasn’t just for battle. Hunter 2: Ugh, don’t make me imagine it. Still, beats freezing my tits off out here. Next time I shoot a deer, I’m skinning it warm just to feel something. hunter: Yeah, well, if you’re that desperate, there’s a giant camp not far from here. Just don’t come crying when they launch you halfway to High Hrothgar.

hunter: Giants? Fuck that. I'd rather take my chances with the hagravens. At least they're not dumb enough to punt you into the stratosphere for fun. Hunter 2: Fair point. Though, knowing you, you’d probably try and fuck the hagraven too before realizing she’s got talons where her tits should be. hunter: Heh, yeah… learned that one the hard way. Let’s just stick to deer and dumb bandits. Less likely to ruin my dignity.
